title: polyscias cissiflora
intro: Polyscias cissiflora, also known as the holly fern or variegated polynesian ivy, is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands, characterized by its distinctive fern-like leaves with wavy margins and a compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Polyscias cissiflora is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polyscias cissiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
